title: 7Bean Avocado Toast Vibe Pattern
source_attribution: 7 Bean Coffee · Avocado Toast 'It's a Vibe' campaign (Mira Road, India)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Hand-drawn cursive 'It's a' + sans-display 'AVOCADO TOAST' + sans body
composition_summary: Hero plate centro · display pattern bg · body text right
why_good: Display 'AVOCADO TOAST' repeated em verde behind hero — pattern technique que vimos em #005, #008
It's a Vibe italic + display mix = Só Rio-feel typography
Blue plate sobre beige bg = cool/warm contrast para hero pop
Body copy à direita reading-flow editorial
caveats: Hand-drawn lettering 'It's a Vibe' é mais playful que Cormorant italic Só Rio. Useful para study, não para imitar
